title: 下载：网络诈骗者的银行绕过和碳清除麻烦
content: 这是今天的《下载》版本，这是我们的平日时事通讯，每天提供技术世界中正在发生的事情。网络诈骗者利用 Telegram 上出售的非法工具绕过银行安全措施 在柬埔寨的一个洗钱“中心”内，一名银行员工发现
original_title: The Download: cyberscammers’ banking bypasses, and carbon removal troubles
original_content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Cyberscammers are bypassing banks’ security with illicit tools sold on Telegram  Inside a money-laundering center in Cambodia, an employee o

title: Anthropic 推出 Claude Design，一款用于创建快速视觉效果的新产品
content: 该公司表示，Claude Design 旨在帮助没有设计背景的创始人和产品经理等人更轻松地分享他们的想法。
original_title: Anthropic launches Claude Design, a new product for creating quick visuals
original_content: The company says Claude Design is intended to help people like founders and product managers without a design background share their ideas more easily.

title: Luma 推出人工智能驱动的制作工作室，推出以信仰为中心的 Wonder Project
content: 该工作室的第一个项目将讲述摩西和奥斯卡奖得主本·金斯利的故事，将于今年春天在 Prime Video 上发布。
original_title: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project
original_content: The studio's first project will be about Moses and star Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, to be released this spring on Prime Video.

title: 英国推出 6.75 亿美元主权人工智能基金
content: 为了尽量减少对其他国家技术的依赖，英国政府正在向本土人工智能初创企业投入资源。
original_title: The UK Launches Its $675 Million Sovereign AI Fund
original_content: In a bid to minimize dependence on technology from other countries, the UK government is plowing resources into homegrown AI startups.

title: 让人工智能在受限的公共部门环境中运行
content: 人工智能热潮席卷了各个行业，公共部门组织面临着加速采用的压力。与此同时，政府机构在安全、治理和运营方面面临着明显的限制，这使得它们与商业机构不同。为此，普
original_title: Making AI operational in constrained public sector environments
original_content: The AI boom has hit across industries, and public sector organizations are facing pressure to accelerate adoption. At the same time, government institutions face distinct constraints around security, governance, and operations that set them apart from their business counterparts. For this reason, pu

title: OpenClaw 给用户带来了另一个对安全性感到恐惧的理由
content: 这种病毒式 AI 代理工具让攻击者能够悄悄地获得未经身份验证的管理员访问权限。
original_title: OpenClaw gives users yet another reason to be freaked out about security
original_content: The viral AI agentic tool let attackers silently gain admin unauthenticated access.

title: DevDay 发布的 AMA
content: 这是历史上成为建设者的最好时代。在 DevDay 2025 上，我们推出了下一代工具和模型，以帮助开发人员更快地编码、更可靠地构建代理并扩展他们的应用程序

title: 人工智能芯片初创公司 Cerebras 申请 IPO
content: 近几个月来，该公司宣布与 Amazon Web Services 达成协议，在 Amazon 数据中心使用 Cerebras 芯片，并与 OpenAI 达成一项据报道价值超过 100 亿美元的协议。
original_title: AI chip startup Cerebras files for IPO
original_content: In recent months, the company announced an agreement with Amazon Web Services to use Cerebras chips in Amazon data centers, as well as a deal with OpenAI reportedly worth more than $10 billion.

title: 人类计划伦敦主要扩建项目
content: 随着与美国政府的紧张关系加剧，Anthropic 租用了一间新办公室，其空间足以使其在伦敦的 200 名员工人数增加四倍。
original_content: As tensions with the US government mount, Anthropic has leased a new office with enough space to quadruple its 200-person head count in London.

title: OpenAI 推出新的 ChatGPT Pro 计划：查看价格、功能和升级
content: 随着 Codex 每周用户数量达到 300 万，OpenAI 推出了介于 Plus 和 200 Pro 级别之间的新订阅计划。
original_title: OpenAI introduces new ChatGPT Pro Plan: Check price, features, and upgrades
original_content: As Codex reaches 3 million weekly users, OpenAI has introduced a new subscription plan positioned between the Plus and 200 Pro tiers.
